ground_truth.description: Photo of ocean with boats from land. No buildings or landmarks visible apart from small pier. Nature indicates Australia. Rottnest Island.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo of the ocean with some boats taken from land. No buildings (apart from a small pier) or landmarks are visible, but nature indicates Australia. More specifically, it is Rottnest Island, but this should be hard or impossible to get. Clear skies, late daytime.

details.description: Calm coastal bay at golden hour with many small recreational boats and yachts moored on buoys. A low timber jetty/pier extends from the right shoreline with several boats nearby. In the foreground are sandy dunes with coastal shrubs and a post-and-rail fence along a sandy path. The water is sheltered and glassy, with low land and trees across the bay. Large cumulus clouds are lit warm by the low sun, under a clear blue sky.

details.description: A tranquil coastal scene on Rottnest Island showing a sheltered bay with numerous boats and yachts anchored in calm, reflective water. In the foreground there is scrubby dune vegetation and a low wooden railing along a sandy path. The sky is clear blue with a few fluffy clouds, and the late-afternoon light casts a warm glow across the boats and distant shoreline. The overall impression is a popular harbor area, likely near Thomson Bay, with a peaceful maritime atmosphere.

details.description: A scenic, eye-level shot looking out over the calm waters of a bay filled with numerous moored white pleasure boats, yachts, and motor vessels. The scene is framed by a foreground of coastal dune vegetation, including low-lying green bushes and grasses, behind a weathered wooden post-and-wire fence. To the right, a timber jetty extends into the water, with several figures visible walking along it. The background features a low horizon line of land across the water. The sky is a vibrant blue, dominated on the left by large, billowing cumulus clouds illuminated by warm, golden-hour sunlight, contrasting with the clearer sky on the right.

details.description: A scenic view of Thomson Bay on Rottnest Island during the late afternoon. In the foreground, there is coastal vegetation consisting of green shrubs and tall grasses, bordered by a rustic wooden and wire fence. The middle ground features a calm bay filled with numerous moored boats, including several catamarans, sailing yachts, and motorboats. In the background, the low-lying coastline of the Thomson Bay Settlement is visible, along with a long wooden jetty extending into the water. The sky is a clear blue with large, soft white and grey clouds catching the warm light of the setting sun.

details.description: Coastal bay scene at golden hour with calm water and scattered low clouds. In the foreground are sand dunes with low coastal vegetation and a wooden handrail/path. Dozens of small boats—yachts and motor cruisers—are moored in the sheltered bay. At right, a long timber jetty extends into the water with a few people visible. Low shoreline with trees and small buildings lines the horizon, under a wide blue sky.

details.description: View across a sheltered coastal bay in late-afternoon light with many small recreational boats and yachts moored on buoys. A short timber jetty/pier projects from the right shoreline. In the foreground is a sandy dune with low coastal heath and a rope‑fenced wooden boardwalk/path leading toward the beach. The water is calm, sky mostly clear with a few cumulus clouds, and a low, scrub‑covered shoreline is visible in the distance.

details.description: A tranquil coastal harbor scene at golden hour. Calm, glassy water houses a collection of boats anchored across a sheltered bay: a prominent tall-masted sailboat toward the left-center, surrounded by several motor yachts and smaller boats. A wooden jetty extends from the right into the water, while a weathered wooden fence runs along a sandy dune in the foreground. Low, dense coastal vegetation fills the foreground, with green shrubs and grasses. The sky is clear blue with a few large, fluffy clouds on the left and some lighter clouds toward the right, casting warm light that highlights the hulls and tops of the boats. Distant rocky islets or shoreline is visible beyond the boats.

details.description: A scenic coastal view of a calm bay filled with numerous moored pleasure boats, captured during the golden hour with warm sunlight illuminating large cumulus clouds on the left. The foreground features a sandy dune area with native coastal scrub vegetation and a rustic post-and-wire fence. In the mid-ground, the water is tranquil, populated by a mix of sailboats and motor yachts. A small dinghy is moving on the left, and a larger boat is active on the right. On the right side of the image, a wooden jetty extends into the water, with several people visible walking or fishing on it. The background shows a low-lying coastline under a blue sky.

details.description: A scenic coastal view of a busy bay filled with numerous moored recreational boats, including catamarans, yachts, and motorboats. The water is calm, reflecting the soft light of late afternoon. In the foreground, there is dense coastal scrub and dune vegetation, partially enclosed by a wooden post-and-rail fence. On the right side of the bay, a long wooden jetty extends into the water with several people visible on it. The sky is a clear blue with large, billowy white and grey clouds. The overall atmosphere is serene and typical of a popular island holiday destination.

details.description: A tranquil coastal scene at golden hour showing a sheltered bay with calm water and many small recreational boats and yachts moored offshore. In the foreground are low coastal dunes with green scrub vegetation and a sandy path bordered by a simple wooden railing/boardwalk. To the right extends a small wooden jetty or pier where a few boats are approaching or tied up. The horizon shows a low, lightly wooded shoreline. The sky is mostly clear blue with a few large, soft clouds catching warm evening light. Overall it appears to be a quiet beachside harbor or mooring field viewed from the foreshore dunes.
